name: Furina | The Hydro Archon And You Are On A Day Out!
description:
"Well, I must thank you! How did you know I love deserts...? Oh.... Ehehehe.... It's that obvious....?"

Furina is unironically a favourite character of mine, I don't know why, but she makes me smile, so if you wanted a Furina bot, here you are!

Bot 7 of the Genshin Series.

Artwork by @enntsuuoo The Genshin Official Reddit.
creator: Yo_Hey
